description: read_page truncated; agent has the headers but the answer is below the fold. Use targeted extraction, not refetch.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://www.example.com/long-doc — Title: Long Documentation]

what does section 5 say?

antiPatterns.reason: Re-reading without scrolling won't reveal section 5.

expected.successRubric: Scroll down to bring section 5 into view, then read_page again. read_page is viewport-aware.
